dashboard.title: Welcome
dashboard.subtitle: Your Financial Overview
dashboard.insight_spending_up: Your spending is up {{pct}}% compared to the previous period.
dashboard.insight_spending_down: Great job! You spent {{pct}}% less than the previous period.
dashboard.insight_savings_excellent: Excellent savings rate of {{pct}}%! Keep it up.
dashboard.insight_savings_low: Your savings rate is {{pct}}%. Try to aim for at least 20%.
dashboard.insight_budget_exceeded: You've exceeded your {{name}} budget for this period!
dashboard.insight_healthy: Your finances look healthy for this period!

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.no_results_desc: Try adjusting your filters or search terms to find what you're looking for.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Strategic Planning
budgets.no_budgets_desc: Create limits to track your spending habits effectively.

advisor.title: AI Advisor
advisor.subtitle: Strategy Assistant
advisor.analyzed_records: I have analyzed your {{count}} latest records. Ask me for a specific insight.
advisor.prompt_spending_text: Analyze my spending patterns. Where am I spending too much and how can I cut back?
advisor.prompt_savings_text: Based on my income and expenses, give me a concrete plan to increase my savings rate.
advisor.prompt_health_text: Give me a comprehensive financial health assessment based on my current data.
advisor.input_placeholder: Describe your goal or ask a question...
advisor.disclaimer: AI can occasionally provide inaccurate financial data. Cross-check your records.
advisor.unavailable: AI Advisor is currently unavailable (Missing API Key).

goals.title: Savings goals
goals.subtitle: Track progress toward targets
goals.no_goals: No goals yet. Create one to start tracking!

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Analysis & Insights
reports.pdf_tip: Tip: after clicking "Export PDF", choose "Save as PDF".

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Sync & Security
profile.enable_cloud_desc: Sign in to sync your finances across all your devices securely.
profile.sync_desc: Your data is synced securely with your private cloud profile.

category.hint: Select a category above and enter your monthly spending limit using the keypad.

goal_drawer.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this savings goal?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.all_caught_up_desc: When something important happens with your finances, we'll let you know.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Get notified 3 times a day to log your transactions
reminders.permissionDenied: Notifications blocked — enable them in browser settings
reminders.unsupported: Notifications not supported on this device
reminders.activeInfo: You'll receive reminders at 8:00 AM, 1:00 PM and 8:00 PM every day
reminders.deniedHelp: Notifications are blocked. Go to your browser settings → Site Settings → Notifications and allow this site.
